FUTURE ACCOUNTING
Off Calendar Aug-31-2020 Continued To Sep-28-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Geoffrey Adams appeared by telephone for and with Gloria Rivera by telephone.

Mr. Adams apologized to the Court stating that during COVID he had no access to the files, that it slipped his mind, and that the accounting is prepared, and the petition is signed and will be e-filed this week. Status on filing of the tenth accounting is continued to September 28, 2020 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The order to appear is off calendar.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Cabasares. Not reported.

FUTURE ACCOUNTING
Off Calendar Aug-03-2020 Continued To Aug-31-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Trustees and the Attorney to appear on August 31, 2020 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why they failed to appear and why the tenth accounting has not been filed. The status hearing is also continued to that date.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Probate Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Deputy: K. Cabasares. Not reported.
